race.description: Stradbroke Season On Sale Now Plate (C3)
race.comment: PHENOM (13) returned in great style last start, coming from a long way back to be beaten under a length over 1350m at this track. The winner of two from three when second-up and the extra trip is to her advantage. Beautifully placed to go one better. SO YOU ARE (8) struggle first-up under a big weight over 1400m at Armidale. Trial winner since that run and the second-up stats read a lot better. Can improve sharply. The lightly raced SIR WINNIE (7) raced on the speed and was tough late in taking out a midweek Class 3 at Eagle Farm recently. Has the job ahead from a wide draw in Saturday company but is going too well to dismiss. CAPTAIN EAGLE (11) resumed in good order over 1350m here last start and will appreciate the step up in distance.
